nodes.label: Three-Tier Memory Hierarchy + Sensor Readout (PPCA Extension)
nodes.source_location: # Three-Tier Memory Hierarchy + Sensor Readout — PPCA Extension
nodes.author: ws

nodes.label: Gap in PPCA as currently specified (finite retention, power cycling wipe, G not exported)
nodes.source_location: ## The Gap in PPCA as Currently Specified
nodes.author: ws

nodes.label: Tier 1 — Perturbation state δG (floating-bulk, τ_fast ≈ 100 ns)
nodes.author: ws

nodes.label: Tier 2 — Active slow weight G (charge-trap, τ_slow ≈ 10 μs–hours)
nodes.author: ws

nodes.label: Tier 3 — Permanent archive G_archive (flash/MRAM/FeRAM, τ_permanent ≈ years)
nodes.author: ws

nodes.label: Tier-3 technology option — NOR/embedded flash (10+ yr retention, 10^5 cycles)
nodes.author: ws

nodes.label: Tier-3 technology option — STT-MRAM (10 yr retention, 10^10 cycles, BEOL)
nodes.author: ws

nodes.label: Tier-3 technology option — FeRAM (10+ yr retention, 10^12 cycles)
nodes.author: ws

nodes.label: Tier-3 technology option — PCM (10 yr retention, 10^8 cycles, BEOL)
nodes.author: ws

nodes.label: Sensor-style readout path (non-destructive scan of G for external observability)
nodes.author: ws

nodes.label: Row-column address scan (select transistors + decoders + sense amp)
nodes.author: ws

nodes.label: Non-destructive probe current (nA-range bias preserves stored charge)
nodes.author: ws

nodes.label: Analog vs digital readout — analog preserves semi-passive architectural purity
nodes.author: ws

nodes.label: Phase 7 — Asynchronous Snapshot/Restore (Tier 2 → Tier 3)
nodes.source_location: ## Architectural Addition — Phase 7 (Snapshot/Restore) in the PPCA Cycle
nodes.author: ws

nodes.label: Snapshot trigger 1 — learning saturation (variance of S below threshold for τ_stable)
nodes.author: ws

nodes.label: Snapshot trigger 2 — scheduled interval (safety net for slow drift)
nodes.author: ws

nodes.label: Snapshot trigger 3 — external save() or power-down interrupt
nodes.author: ws

nodes.label: Three-timescale family — {τ_fast ≈ 100 ns, τ_slow ≈ 10 μs–h, τ_archive ≈ min–h}
nodes.source_location: ## Architectural Addition — Phase 7 (Snapshot/Restore) in the PPCA Cycle
nodes.author: ws

nodes.label: Three-role device — same silicon is learner, live memory, sensor, and persistent archive simultaneously
nodes.source_location: ### The device becomes a three-role object simultaneously
nodes.author: ws

nodes.label: Failure mode — snapshot-during-learning race (Tier 3 captures partial G mid-Phase-6)
nodes.author: ws

nodes.label: Failure mode — restore divergence (perturbation state re-initialized, Gaussian σ must be archived)
nodes.author: ws

nodes.label: Failure mode — readout-induced forgetting (probe-current disturbance accumulates)
nodes.author: ws

nodes.label: MVC (Stage 5) decision — defer on-chip Tier 3, validate sensor readout first, off-chip flash stand-in
nodes.source_location: ### Relation to the roadmap's Stage 5 (MVC tape-out)
nodes.author: ws

nodes.label: Snapshot-to-learning ratio τ_archive/τ_slow — new hyperparameter set by flash endurance

nodes.label: Snapshot energy budget — 256×256 tile: flash ~655 μJ, MRAM ~6.5 μJ per snapshot
